valor: &StrTran( cValToChar( iif( ( nPrLayAux := iif( !superGetMv('MV_LJCNVDA', , .F.), self:oPublica['B0_PRV1'], self:oPublica['DA1_PRCVEN'] ) ) > 0, nPrLayAux, posicione('SB1', 1, xFilial('SB1') + iif( !superGetMv('MV_LJCNVDA', , .F.), self:oPublica['B0_COD'], self:oPublica['DA1_CODPRO'] ), 'B1_PRV1') )	), '.', ',' )
idProprietario: &IIF( !SuperGetMv('MV_LJCNVDA', , .F.), LjRetComp( padR(self:oPublica['B0_FILIAL'], tamSx3('B0_FILIAL')[1]),'CADASTRO DE LOJA' ), Eval({|cIdProp| cIdProp := LjAuxPosic('COMPARTILHAMENTOS', 'tabelaPreco', padR(self:oPublica['DA1_FILIAL'], tamSx3('DA1_FILIAL')[1]) + padR(self:oPublica['DA1_CODTAB'], tamSx3('DA1_CODTAB')[1]), 'IdProprietario') , IIF(Empty(cIdProp),LjRetComp(),cIdProp)}) )
